summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN Hungarian car wash management system. Backend APIs 92.9% successful, frontend UI fully functional with proper authentication flow.

ui_bugs.note: Desktop sidebar works correctly, mobile functionality needs verification on actual mobile device
